name: etechflow/module-next-day-eligibility
description: Automatically manages a Next Day Eligible attribute on products based on real-time stock and a per-product Drop-Ship override, and restricts configured next-day shipping methods at checkout when any cart item is not eligible.

suggest.hyva-themes/magento2-default-theme: Hyvä Theme support is built in — install Hyvä to enable Tailwind-styled templates automatically.
suggest.etechflow/module-backorder-eta-display: Pair with Backorder ETA Display to show next-day eligibility and backorder ETAs together.
